title: Museum
summary: A museum is an institution dedicated to displaying and preserving culturally or scientifically significant objects. The English word 'museum' comes from the Latin word museum (also mouseion), and is originally from the Ancient Greek Μουσεῖον (Mouseion), which denotes a place or temple dedicated to the Muses, the nine goddesses of the arts in Greek mythology. Such an institution was therefore conceived as a seat of the Muses.
